title: stachys × bodeana
intro: Stachys × bodeana, also known as Betony or Wood Betony, is a perennial plant in the mint family, native to Europe and Western Asia. The leaves and flowers of the Stachys × bodeana plant have been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly for their ability to reduce inflammation and improve mental clarity, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for stress and anxiety. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which have been shown to have analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. Stachys × bodeana is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used to promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
